postmark.Subject: 2nd mortgage — Marcus Webb
postmark.TextBody:
Hi Franco,

2nd mortgage for Marcus Webb. $185k behind existing Royal Bank of Canada 1st ($380k balance). Combined LTV 78% on $720k property.

Exit strategy: borrower intends to sell the property at end of term.
